content.en:
In a short period of time, more than a dozen commander-level forbidden zergs have fallen.

For the Forbidden Zerg, such a loss is enough to make their hearts ache, after all, the Forbidden Zerg has only been more than fifty commander-level Forbidden Zerg so far.

I thought that under the continuous attack and killing of the Qinglong Palace Lord, once the commander-level taboo zerg was killed, the taboo zerg would automatically collapse.

But at this time, the mutation protruded.

Rumble!!!!

A taboo zerg that suddenly appeared suddenly burst out with a power comparable to that of a lord-level forbidden zerg, and instantly attacked an invincible Dao Ancestor, this invincible Dao Ancestor was the Northern Forest Emperor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and his strength was relatively weak among the invincible Dao Ancestors.

Poof!

A long leg turned into a sharp weapon and directly pierced the body of the Northern Forest Emperor, and the terrifying power of the dark forbidden instantly annihilated his vitality.

Under one blow, the Emperor of Beilin fell and died.

This scene was beyond everyone's expectations, not even the Blue Dragon Palace Master.

"There is also the seventh lord-level forbidden zerg, and it hides its aura, it actually hides its aura!!!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was shocked.

Even the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor who were in the battle were extremely surprised, according to the information detected, there should be no such a lord-level forbidden Zerg who could hide his breath.

However, if the lord-level forbidden zerg would hide their aura, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King would naturally not be able to detect it.

"It may be the forbidden zerg with a lot of intelligence!"

Several half-step domain ancestors guessed in their hearts.

"Look for death!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was furious.

If it was the invincible Dao Ancestor of other forces who fell, he might not be very angry, but this lord-level forbidden Zerg killed the invincible Dao Ancestor of their Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the death of an invincible Dao Ancestor was also a huge loss for the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Rumble!!!

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord killed the lord-level forbidden zerg, and what was shocking was that the strength of the lord-level forbidden zerg was not weaker than the Qinglong Palace Lord, and the two fought back and forth.

Without the attack of the Qinglong Palace Lord, the pressure on the invincible Dao Ancestors doubled.

"Shenxu Dao Ancestor, you have the fastest speed, you go and continue to kill the commander-level forbidden zerg!"

The White Tiger Palace Lord proposed.

After all, there is one more of their seven half-step domain ancestors to deal with the six-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, but in order to completely form a crushing momentum, this requires seven big sixes, but if six fights six, even if they don't have an advantage, it is enough to drag them down.

"Good!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor agreed.

Swish!

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor instantly broke away from the battlefield of the half-step domain ancestor, tore through the void, and came to the battlefield of the invincible Dao ancestors, facing one of the commander-level forbidden zergs.

However, the attack power of the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor was not as strong as that of the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, so he could not kill a commander-level forbidden zerg with one blow, but two attacks were enough to kill a commander-level forbidden zerg.

The attack of the half-step domain ancestor was so fast, so it didn't take much time to attack twice with all his strength, so as soon as the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor made a move, the commander-level forbidden zerg began to fall one by one.

In a short period of time, the commander-level forbidden zerg suffered heavy losses.

But.

At this time, there was still another invincible Dao Ancestor who fell, it was the Silent Dao Ancestor from the Mitian Sect, who was besieged and killed by the six commander-level taboo zergs.

There is no way, there are too many commander-level taboo zergs, and the invincible Dao Ancestors need one person to deal with two or three, and the silent Dao Ancestor is suddenly surrounded by six commander-level taboo zergs, one of which is a commander-level taboo zerg's strength far exceeds that of other commander-level taboo zergs, and his combat power is not much worse than that of a half-step domain ancestor.

Therefore, the silent Daozu could not be stopped, and was directly killed.

After the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor found out that the silent Dao Ancestor had fallen, he directly attacked the powerful commander-level Forbidden Zerg, which could deal with the Ten Percent Forbidden Body, plus the attack power far beyond the commander-level level, coupled with the cooperation of the other five commander-level Forbidden Zerg, he actually resisted the attack of the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor for a while.

According to this trend, although they can't beat it, they can resist it for a while.

"How can this be, how can this commander-level forbidden zerg be so much stronger than other commander-level forbidden zerg!!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor was very puzzled.

If Ye Tian was here, he would know the reason, because this commander-level forbidden zerg also had forbidden talents, and the forbidden zergs with forbidden talents far exceeded ordinary forbidden zergs.

It's like a half-step domain ancestor and a lord-level forbidden zerg, the lord-level forbidden zerg relies on the forbidden talent, which is enough to compete with the half-step domain ancestor who created the forbidden dao technique, and even relies on the physical advantage, if it is a long-term fight, it can even have a certain upper hand.

After all, the Dark Forbidden Domain is simply the most suitable combat environment for them, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor is still a little unsuitable for the environment of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he can't perfectly exert his combat ability.

If it was in the Dao Mountain Realm, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor would be able to kill this commander-level forbidden Zerg with forbidden talent in a short period of time.

Regarding the war between the Invincible Dao Ancestor and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian did not pay attention.

At this moment, he was fighting alone against thirty Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zergs to relieve the pressure on the others.

If it were other top Sevenfold Heaven Dao Ancestors, they would have been surrounded and killed a long time ago, but Ye Tian could easily resist the siege of so many Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zergs, and occasionally he could kill one or two.

Of course, the greatest confidence for him to dare to face the siege of thirty Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg is not the attack power, no matter how strong the attack power is, he can't block the siege of so many Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg, and even the strongest Dao Ancestor with a weaker defense will fall and die if he is not careful.

But Ye Tiannai is a Dao Ancestor promoted by the Supreme True Ancestor, and he has the Supreme Dao Source, and he can use the power of the Forbidden Origin to repair his injuries without restrictions.

Therefore, Ye Tian was injured again and again, and he used the power of the forbidden origin to heal his injuries again and again, and he couldn't die at all.

He may not be killed unless his one-time attack exceeds his limit, allowing him to be injured faster than he can repair.

As the Seventh Heaven Forbidden Zerg died, Ye Tian's pressure became less and less, and the faster he killed.

Similarly, Ye Tian's copy body, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King's combat power, was also so terrifying, and it was also against dozens of Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg.

And Ye Tian's strength also attracted the attention of many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and they were all amazed.

"My God, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King is too terrifying, one person can fight dozens of Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg alone, and he can also torture and kill them!"

"The combat power of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King has surpassed that of the Ghost Prince, and he can even kill the Ghost Boy by himself, compared with the weakest Supreme Dao Ancestor, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King is not weak, if it is compared to the ability to save his life, he is more terrifying than the average Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

"Hahaha, with the Nine Extremes Heavenly King here, our pressure is much less, hurry up and kill, kill all the forbidden zergs here, and then go to support the Dao Ancestors in other places!"

The same praise is also happening on Ye Tian's body.

And Ye Tian killed the Forbidden Zerg with all his strength, without the slightest distraction.
